texto: To take away a woman's ability to walk is one thing
autor: it's quite another to take away her ability to speak. -(Lady Meesha) I Am Lady Sasha -The Journey From Slave to Slave-
explicacao: Citação de it's quite another to take away her ability to speak. -(Lady Meesha) I Am Lady Sasha -The Journey From Slave to Slave- sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “To take away a woman's ability to walk is one thing” articula reflexao, julienne-russell, woman em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
